root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_006005.balance_date, vr_nsk_010_006005.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_006005.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_006005.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_006005.memname, vr_nsk_010_006005.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_006005.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_006005.share_period, vr_nsk_010_006005.share_balance FROM vr_nsk_010_006005 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where vr_nsk_010_006005.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' and vr_nsk_010_006005.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no /*WHERE*/
